query:
UPDATE draw_records 
SET bigSmall = CASE 
  WHEN (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
      SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(numbers, CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')) as num 
      FROM draw_records dr, 
      (SELECT 0 as idx UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 
       UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
       UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14
       UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19) nums
      WHERE dr.drawNumber = draw_records.drawNumber 
      AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(numbers, CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')) AS UNSIGNED) >= 51 
      AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(numbers, CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')) AS UNSIGNED) <= 80
    ) t
  ) >= 13 THEN 'big'
  WHEN (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
      SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(numbers, CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')) as num 
      FROM draw_records dr, 
      (SELECT 0 as idx UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 
       UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9
       UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14
       UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19) nums
      WHERE dr.drawNumber = draw_records.drawNumber 
      AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(numbers, CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')) AS UNSIGNED) >= 1 
      AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(numbers, CONCAT('$[', idx, ']')) AS UNSIGNED) <= 50
    ) t
  ) >= 13 THEN 'small'
  ELSE '－'
END
WHERE bigSmall = '－';
command:
